Showcase grammar
Panels, code cards, callouts, evidence — composed, not rowed.
Authored input
viroc.yaml + vidir
Code Card
Semantic IR
scenes: [...]
entities: [...]
the editable IR
Author note
human in the loop
Evidence
Source hashes
manim sha256
html sha256
remotion sha256
byte-stable
Resolver
layout + time
Code Card
Concrete IR
objects + boxes
keyframes
resolved + placed
Review surface
before render
Evidence
build.json
renderer + phash
source_hash
reproducibility
HTML path
browser render
Remotion path
react render
Code Card
scene.html
positioned divs
inline styles
self-contained

Composition.tsx

generated project
